title: G-1145, E-Notification of Application/Petition Acceptance
description: Requests text or email notification when USCIS accepts a filing.

fields.tooltip: Complete this form and clip it on top of the first page of your immigration form or forms.  Enter Mobile Telephone Number without spaces, dashes, slashes or parenthesis; for example (011) 555-0101 enter as 0115550101.
fields.notes: Scaffold only. Confirm this field manually before using it for generated filings.
Scaffold only. Confirm this field manually before using it for generated filings.
